name: Rocket Mortgage
description_short: Rocket Mortgage is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 3.7/5 with 1,497 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Rocket Mortgage is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. With 1,497 Google reviews and a 3.7/5.0 rating, Rocket Mortgage has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Rocket Mortgage specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Rocket Mortgage operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Rocket Mortgage should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
